title: phegopteris nitens
intro: Phegopteris nitens, also known as the shining maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris nitens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and improve liver function. Phegopteris nitens is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it is also used in some herbal supplements in capsule or tablet form.
